Score (Dsch) CHAR 2 This column documents the total mood score by adding the frequencies documented in the questions above at the time of discharge. 00 = Minimum Total Severity Score 
27 = Maximum Total Severity Score 
99 = Patient was unable to complete the interview 
- = Not Assessed/No Information
514 SCL_ISLTN_ADMSN_CD SCL_ISLTN_ADMSN_CD Social Isolation (Adm) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, how often the patient feels lonely or isolated from those around them. 0
